item.name: Wind-up Edge
item.description:
Based on one of the few people who had the chance to be a prince and a ninja, which seems like too much fun to squeeze into one lifetime.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Edge minion.
item.tooltip:
You think our rage...a weakness?
Then let me show you how wrong you are!
   - Edge
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases ATK of all allies within range by 25.
Duration: 6s
